Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Criminal Code (bestiality)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Criminal Code (bestiality)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Criminal Code to define the term âbestialityâ.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: Section 160 of the Criminal Code is amended by adding the following after subsection (3):

Subsection.Text: In this section, bestiality means any contact by a person, for a sexual purpose, with an animal.
